title: Add document dependencies and module structure
description: Add project-local document processing dependencies through uv and create backend document modules for conversion, parsing, formatting, and exporting.
acceptance_criteria: Backend has document module entry points for converter/parser/formatter/exporter and dependencies are recorded in backend/pyproject.toml and uv.lock without using system Python or sudo pip.
test_mcp: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_document_engine.py -q
review_initial_requirements: document-input: Legacy DOC conversion; DOCX structure parsing; docx-formatting: Profile page and body formatting
review_regression_requirements: Existing backend tests still import app modules and pass.
notes: verification:cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_document_engine.py -q -> 1 passed; regression:cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_foundation.py tests/test_profiles.py tests/test_profiles_api.py -q -> 20 passed, 1 known StarletteDeprecationWarning

title: Add DOCX fixture and inspection test helpers
description: Add reusable tests helpers for creating minimal DOCX fixtures and inspecting page margins, paragraph formatting, table borders, and text preservation.
acceptance_criteria: Tests can generate a valid DOCX fixture with paragraphs/table/captions/references and inspect formatted DOCX properties without external services.
test_mcp: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_document_engine.py -q
review_initial_requirements: document-input: Input content preservation; docx-formatting: Profile page and body formatting / Table basic formatting
review_regression_requirements: Test helpers do not write outside pytest tmp_path.
notes: verification:cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_document_engine.py -q -> 2 passed; regression:cd backend && uv run pytest -q -> 22 passed, 1 known StarletteDeprecationWarning

title: Implement LibreOffice DOC conversion adapter
description: Implement a converter that turns .doc into .docx via configured soffice and raises clear diagnostic errors when LibreOffice is unavailable or conversion fails.
acceptance_criteria: Given .doc input and missing soffice, converter raises a diagnostic error. Given configured soffice, converter invokes headless conversion and returns the converted .docx path.
test_mcp: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_document_engine.py -q
review_initial_requirements: document-input: Legacy DOC conversion / Convert DOC before processing / Conversion failure is diagnostic
notes: verification:cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_document_engine.py -q -> 4 passed; regression:cd backend && uv run pytest -q -> 24 passed, 1 known StarletteDeprecationWarning

title: Implement DOCX structure parser
description: Implement parser returning paragraph count, table count, image/drawing count, heading candidates, paragraph styles, and text-preservation summary.
acceptance_criteria: Valid DOCX returns expected structural summary. Corrupt or unreadable DOCX raises a diagnostic parser error.
test_mcp: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_document_engine.py -q
review_initial_requirements: document-input: DOCX structure parsing / Parse DOCX summary / Invalid DOCX is rejected; Input content preservation
review_regression_requirements: Parser does not mutate input DOCX bytes.
notes: verification:cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_document_engine.py -q -> 6 passed; regression:cd backend && uv run pytest -q -> 26 passed, 1 known StarletteDeprecationWarning

title: Add conversion and parser tests
description: Cover DOCX parsing, corrupt DOCX failure, content preservation, and .doc conversion failure when LibreOffice is unavailable.
acceptance_criteria: Tests fail before implementation and pass after converter/parser implementation, including failure branches.
test_mcp: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_document_engine.py -q
review_regression_requirements: cd backend && uv run pytest -q remains green.
notes: verification:cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_document_engine.py -q -> 8 passed; regression:cd backend && uv run pytest -q -> 28 passed, 1 known StarletteDeprecationWarning

title: Apply profile page, body, and heading formatting
description: Implement deterministic DOCX formatting for page settings, body paragraph defaults, line spacing, first-line indent, and heading styles from selected profile.
acceptance_criteria: Formatted DOCX uses ECNU margins, body fonts, 1.5 line spacing, first-line indent, heading font/alignment, and preserves text.
test_mcp: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_document_formatting.py -q
review_initial_requirements: docx-formatting: Profile page and body formatting / Heading and special paragraph formatting
review_regression_requirements: Existing profile schema tests remain green.
notes: verification:cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_document_formatting.py -q -> 1 passed; regression:cd backend && uv run pytest -q -> 29 passed, 1 known StarletteDeprecationWarning

title: Apply captions, equations, references, and table borders
description: Implement formatting helpers for table/figure caption paragraphs, equation alignment, reference hanging indent, and basic three-line table borders.
acceptance_criteria: Formatted DOCX keeps caption/formula/reference text, applies expected alignment/font defaults, and ordinary tables receive basic top/header-bottom/bottom borders.
test_mcp: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_document_formatting.py -q
review_initial_requirements: docx-formatting: Heading and special paragraph formatting / Table basic formatting / Conservative unsupported handling
review_regression_requirements: Body and heading formatting tests continue passing.
notes: verification:cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_document_formatting.py tests/test_document_engine.py -q -> 10 passed; regression:cd backend && uv run pytest -q -> 30 passed, 1 known StarletteDeprecationWarning

title: Add DOCX formatting regression tests
description: Add tests confirming margins, fonts, line spacing, first-line indent, heading style, table borders, and text preservation for ECNU profile formatting.
acceptance_criteria: Formatting tests inspect the generated DOCX structure and fail if formatting is missing or text content changes.
test_mcp: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_document_formatting.py -q
review_regression_requirements: cd backend && uv run pytest -q remains green.

title: Register generated output files
description: Extend local file storage/repository flow to store generated DOCX/PDF bytes or files as FileRecord entries usable by existing file metadata API.
acceptance_criteria: Generated output files are stored under local storage, receive file ids, have correct MIME/filename/sha256/size metadata, and are retrievable through GET /api/files/{file_id}.
test_mcp: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_document_worker.py -q
review_initial_requirements: document-output: Formatted output registration / Register formatted DOCX output / Retrieve output metadata
review_regression_requirements: Existing upload FileRecord tests continue passing.

title: Implement document formatting service
description: Implement a service that resolves input file/profile version, converts DOC if needed, parses DOCX, formats DOCX, optionally exports PDF, and returns output file records.
acceptance_criteria: Service produces formatted DOCX for a valid DOCX input and profile. PDF export failure is diagnostic. Missing profile/input raises clear errors.
test_mcp: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_document_worker.py -q
review_initial_requirements: document-output: PDF export / Formatting job lifecycle; document-input: Legacy DOC conversion
review_regression_requirements: Document parser/formatter unit tests remain green.

title: Run document engine from worker lifecycle
description: Update process_placeholder_job/process_next_queued_job so profile-referenced format jobs run the document engine, update progress/status, attach outputs, and report failures.
acceptance_criteria: Profile-referenced jobs transition queued->running->completed with output ids on success and failed with readable error on conversion/parsing/profile/output errors. Unprofiled jobs remain backwards-compatible placeholders.
test_mcp: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_document_worker.py tests/test_foundation.py -q
review_initial_requirements: document-output: Formatting job lifecycle / Formatting job completes / Formatting job fails
review_regression_requirements: Existing unprofiled placeholder worker tests continue passing.

title: Add worker and API output tests
description: Add tests for successful formatted DOCX output, output metadata retrieval, missing profile/input failure, and PDF export failure diagnostics.
acceptance_criteria: Worker/API tests cover successful outputs and failure branches and pass with the implemented service.
test_mcp: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_document_worker.py -q
review_regression_requirements: cd backend && uv run pytest -q remains green.

title: Load output file metadata in frontend task panel
description: Extend frontend task status handling to fetch metadata for every job output_file_id and show loading/error states without blocking upload/profile panels.
acceptance_criteria: Completed jobs with output ids display output filename, size, and file id. Missing metadata is shown as a non-blocking error.
review_initial_requirements: document-output: Frontend output visibility / Display outputs / Display errors
review_regression_requirements: Profile selection and job creation UI still builds and works.

title: Display formatting outputs and errors
description: Add task panel UI for DOCX/PDF outputs, selected profile references, and formatting errors while preserving uploaded file context.
acceptance_criteria: Frontend shows output ids/metadata on completed jobs and displays failed job error_message without hiding input file/profile context.
review_initial_requirements: document-output: Frontend output visibility / Display outputs / Display errors
review_regression_requirements: Existing upload, profile list, editor, YAML, and job controls still build.

title: Update document engine documentation
description: Update README/backend/frontend docs for DOC/DOCX conversion, formatting engine scope, PDF export, SOFFICE_BIN, generated outputs, and verification commands.
acceptance_criteria: Docs explain environment requirements, no-formatting limitations that are now removed, remaining non-goals, and how to verify DOCX/PDF outputs.
test_mcp: manual: rg README docs for document engine terms; cd backend && uv run pytest -q; cd frontend && npm run build

title: Run document engine verification
description: Run OpenSpec strict validation, backend tests, frontend build, and document tool smoke checks for generated DOCX/PDF outputs where local tools are available.
acceptance_criteria: openspec validate add-docx-formatting-engine --strict --no-interactive passes. Backend tests pass. Frontend build passes. Generated DOCX is inspectable with codex-docx-inspect; PDF smoke is run when LibreOffice is available or marked validation_limited with manual steps.
test_mcp: openspec validate add-docx-formatting-engine --strict --no-interactive && cd backend && uv run pytest && cd ../frontend && npm run build
review_regression_requirements: Foundation and profile management tests/build remain green.
